title: agropyron pringlei
intro: Agropyron pringlei, also known as Pringle's wheatgrass, is a species of wild grass native to North America. It is a type of grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron pringlei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Agropyron pringlei can be prepared as a tea, juice, or supplement, and it is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
